name: web_search
description: Search the public web and return ranked results with title, URL, and snippet.
when_to_use: User asks for a fact you don't reliably know, or for information likely to have changed since your training data (current events, prices, releases, weather).
when_not_to_use: User asks an opinion, asks about themselves or their files, or the answer is plainly in a context report you've been given.

query.description: The search query, written as a normal user would type it.
